title: Set node overwriting existing fields
symptom: The Set node is removing existing fields instead of adding new ones, resulting in only the new fields being present in the output.
applies_when: Trying to add new fields to existing data
root_cause: The 'Keep Only Set' option in the Set node is enabled, which causes n8n to discard all existing fields and retain only those specified in the Set node configuration.
fix_steps: Turn OFF the 'Keep Only Set' option
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Keep Only Set' option in the Set node settings.
